english: to have something in one's blood / to have a natural talent or instinct for something
notes: Idiomatic expression meaning someone has a natural, innate ability or passion for something. 'Das' refers to a previously mentioned skill or trait.

sentences.german: Du hast das im Blut – du tanzt, als ob du nie etwas anderes gemacht hättest.
sentences.english: You have it in your blood – you dance as if you've never done anything else.
